output.summary: Removed HTML tag hints from heading size toggle labels. Changed 'Regular (H2)' to 'Regular' and 'Small (H3)' to 'Small' in the ToggleGroupControlOption label props. TSX-only change, no PHP update required (editor UI only). Build passed. Lint errors present are all in unrelated files (MainWrapper, FullWidthMedia, TestimonialsCarousel) — pre-existing and not caused by this change.
